project.name: Q2 Mobile App Release
project.description: Mobile application development and release for Q2 2026

tasks.name: Design System Components
tasks.description: Create reusable UI component library and design tokens for mobile platforms with consistent styling across iOS and Android implementations

tasks.name: Backend Authentication API
tasks.description: Implement OAuth 2.0 authentication service with token refresh mechanisms, session management, and secure credential handling for mobile clients

tasks.name: Database Schema Implementation
tasks.description: Design and deploy PostgreSQL database schema including user profiles, projects, activity logs, and supporting indexes for optimal query performance

tasks.name: API Documentation
tasks.description: Complete OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for all REST endpoints including request/response schemas, error responses, and authentication requirements

tasks.name: iOS UI Implementation
tasks.description: Build SwiftUI screens for onboarding, dashboard, task management, and settings modules with full navigation and state management integration

tasks.name: Android UI Implementation
tasks.description: Develop Jetpack Compose interfaces for onboarding, dashboard, task management, and settings modules with proper lifecycle handling and data binding

tasks.name: Integration Testing
tasks.description: Execute comprehensive end-to-end testing across iOS and Android platforms verifying backend service integration, error handling, and data synchronization

tasks.name: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Optimize application startup time, memory usage patterns, network request efficiency, and rendering performance across target devices

tasks.name: Security Audit
tasks.description: Conduct third-party security assessment covering authentication mechanisms, data encryption, API security, and mobile-specific vulnerabilities
